---
title: "Quality_control"
author: "Catriona Miller"
date: '2023-05-17'
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
het_file <- read.csv("plink.het", sep="")
mean_F <- mean(het_file$F)
sd_F <- sd(het_file$F)
outliers <- subset(het_file, F < (mean_F - 3*sd_F) | F > (mean_F + 3*sd_F))
write.csv(outliers, file='het_outliers.csv')
```

```{r}
genome_file <- read.csv("plink.genome", sep="")
```

```{r}
eigenvec <- read.csv("plink.eigenvec",sep="",header=F)
PC12 <- eigenvec[,c(3,4)]
eigenvec$dist <- mahalanobis(PC12,colMeans(PC12),cov(PC12))
eigenvec$pval <- pchisq(eigenvec$dist, df=1, lower.tail = FALSE)
PCoutliers <- subset(eigenvec, pval < 0.001)
write.csv(PCoutliers, file="PCA_outliers.csv")
```
